zh.lifeSummary: 當Colonel Thomas Ligon III於1632年1月11日出生在英國瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維時，他的父親Thomas Lygon II55歲，母親Elizabeth Pratt29歲。他和Mary Harris至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1675年3月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Colonel Thomas Ligon III于1632年1月11日出生在英国瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維时，他的父亲Thomas Lygon II55岁，母亲Elizabeth Pratt29岁。他和Mary Harris至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1675年3月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ligon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Lygon, the name of an aristocratic English family said to be of Norman origin. It is of unexplained etymology (but compare French name below).
French: from the personal name Higon, a southern French variant of Hugo, with fused definite article l'.
Polish (also Ligoń): nickname from a derivative of Old Polish ligać ‘to lie’ or ‘to kick up a fuss’.

variants.name: Ligons
meanings: English: variant of Ligon , with excrescent excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Colonel Thomas Ligon III was born on 11 January 1632, in Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thomas Lygon II, was 55 and his mother, Elizabeth Pratt, was 29. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Mary Harris. He died on 16 March 1675, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Colonel Thomas Ligon III est né le 11 janvier 1632, à Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Lygon II, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Pratt, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Mary Harris. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1675, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Colonel Thomas Ligon III родился 11 января 1632 г. в местности валсграв он соу, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Lygon II было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pratt, 29. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mary Harris. Он умер 16 марта 1675 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет.
